import tempfile
import os

def write_report(data: str) -> str:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".txt", delete=False) as tmp:
        tmp.write(data)
        tmp.flush()
        os.fsync(tmp.fileno())
        return tmp.name

def create_workspace() -> str:
    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="workspace_") as tmp_dir:
        config_path = os.path.join(tmp_dir, "config.json")
        with open(config_path, "w") as f:
            f.write("{}")
        return tmp_dir

def process_upload(file_bytes: bytes) -> str:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="wb", suffix=".bin", delete=False) as tmp:
        tmp.write(file_bytes)
        return tmp.name

def export_csv(rows: list[dict]) -> str:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".csv", delete=False) as tmp:
        for row in rows:
            tmp.write(",".join(str(v) for v in row.values()) + "\n")
        return tmp.name
